items.title: Exploratory data analysis on high-dimensional datasets
items.description: Plot PCA, t-SNE, or UMAP coordinates colored by known labels to discover separability, outliers, and batch effects before modeling.

items.title: Neural representation inspection
items.description: Visualize penultimate-layer or text embeddings from transformers; color by language, topic, or toxicity label to audit what the model encodes.

items.title: Model debugging and error analysis
items.description: Overlay prediction errors on embeddings to locate confusable class pairs and systematic failure regions complementary to confusion matrices.

items.title: Cluster hypothesis for unsupervised workflows
items.description: Use visual density and separation to propose cluster counts and validate whether clustering algorithms recover the same structure.

items.title: Publication and stakeholder communication
items.description: Produce accessible, reproducible figures with documented methods, colorblind-safe palettes, and exported coordinates for papers and demos.
